programme.title: 80 for Brady
programme.desc: Four best friends live life to the fullest when they embark on a wild trip to see their hero, Tom Brady, play in the 2017 Super Bowl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Minari
programme.desc: A Korean American family moves to an Arkansas farm in search of its own American dream. Amidst the challenges of this new life in the strange and rugged Ozarks, they discover the undeniable resilience of family and what really makes a home.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: After settling in Green Hills, Sonic is eager to prove that he has what it takes to be a true hero. His test comes when Dr. Robotnik returns with a new partner, Knuckles, in search of a mystical emerald that has the power to destroy civilizations. Sonic teams up with his own sidekick, Tails, and together they embark on a globe-trotting journey to find the emerald before it falls into the wrong hands.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Spawned from a lab experiment gone awry, teenage terrapins Leonardo, Michelangelo, Donatello and Raphael live in the sewers beneath New York. Although their rodent sensei, Splinter, advises against showing themselves above ground, the justice-loving, pizza-eating brothers can't stand idly by while evil Shredder and his minions terrorize the city. With help from intrepid reporter April O'Neil (Megan Fox) and her cameraman (Will Arnett), the Turtles set out to save New York.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 2
programme.desc: After learning that one of their victims, Maya, is still alive, three masked maniacs return to finish the job. With nowhere to run and no one to trust, Maya soon finds herself in a brutal fight for survival against psychopaths who are more than willing to kill anyone who stands in their way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Best You Can
programme.desc: Cynthia Rand is a New York City urologist whose world gets turned upside down when her husband starts to show signs of dementia. Stan Olszewski is an underachieving security guard who drifts through life without much direction. Their worlds soon collide when a chance encounter leads to a growing friendship built on late-night texts, candid confessions and irreverent humor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Kill 'Em All 2
programme.desc: A retired spy and his long-lost daughter are living peacefully off the grid in Italy. When their whereabouts are discovered by the vengeful brother of their previous target, they must do whatever it takes to escape from his army of thugs.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Balestra
programme.desc: Joanna is a competitive fencer who is desperate to be the world's best. In order to gain an edge, she pursues an experimental technology, allowing her to train through lucid dreaming, where she begins a tumultuous affair with her instructor.

programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Zest for Death: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah Swensen is determined to get to the bottom of the mystery after her mother finds the dead body of a homeowner, and frequent patron of The Cookie Jar, while house-hunting for her sister Michelle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Sprinkle of Deceit: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah and Chad flirt with their own paths to solve the same murder while working to clear a colleague who is implicated in the crime. Meanwhile, Delores gets her big break.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. Training a detachment of graduates for a special assignment, Maverick must confront the ghosts of his past and his deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who choose to fly it.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Dead Reckoning Part One
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team must track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if it falls into the wrong hands. With control of the future and the fate of the world at stake, a deadly race around the globe begins. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than the mission -- not even the lives of those he cares about most.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy the shape-shifting Pennywise -- now more powerful than ever.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: Al-Hashimi reveals details from her medical history, forcing Robby to face an ethical dilemma as he prepares to leave for his sabbatical.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Trades
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Taser invites everyone to his house for dinner, but really to move his furniture; Jenn and Janet hire strippers for Chelsea's birthday at The Leaky Pipe.

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
programme.desc: Korpi dismantles the house where his family was murdered and loads it on a truck to rebuild it somewhere safe. He soon finds himself in a violent cross-country chase as the Red Army commander who killed his family comes back to finish the job.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. Training a detachment of graduates for a special assignment, Maverick must confront the ghosts of his past and his deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who choose to fly it.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Longing
programme.desc: Daniel, a wealthy bachelor in his 60s, learns that a former girlfriend gave birth to a child 20 years ago and that his son has just died. Daniel explores his deceased son's life, getting to know him vicariously through those closest to him, and he reevaluates his life choices.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Subjects of Desire
programme.desc: Exploring the cultural shift in North American beauty standards toward embracing Black female aesthetics and features while exposing the deliberate and often dangerous portrayals of Black women in the media.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen remembers what it feels like to be a school kid again when she takes up a new form of exercise.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: An initially fun game of golf between Brent, Lacey and Hank quickly turns into a round robin of aggravation.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: The York Memorial team deals with the life changing-surgery of one of their own.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: H.appiness
programme.desc: An app designed to bring its users happiness helps a man build the perfect life, which he ends up destroying when he learns the app is faulty.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second; just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
